nodes.title: CFG Note and Sampler
widgets_values:
Increase CFG to 2.5, 3 or 3.5 if no lip movement. higher than that may case too much change in head position

try non-Ancestral Sampler for softer result if ancestral is making face too different

nodes.title: PROMPT NOTE - Relay vs Regular
widgets_values: Single Prompt (not relay) node seems to Work OK because we are driving the scene from an existing video. The prompt can function fine even if it is not extensive or broken in to time sections since LTX doesn't need all the details as text now

the subject is standing they look at the camera and whispers in a brittish accent they say "I use LTX for lipsync because my tits just looks so much better in Wahn," her voice quiet sentual and soft

scene sound is dialogue only

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (NEGATIVE Prompt)
widgets_values: photorealistic, color, painted, 3D render, smooth, digital art, morphing, distortion, blurry, face changing, extra limbs, deformed, slow motion, simple, still image, subtitle, text, captions, bright, music, soundtrack, background music, music swell

nodes.title: Why resize, then resize?
widgets_values: no need actually, we could load straight to 640 x 384, however since i was testing a 1280x768 key frame I left it in.  But as of now the whole workflow works off a low res 640x384 since the LTX latent upscale works better than pixel upscale since the distill lora expects it AND the lora does more that 2x

nodes.title: Why Disable Mid Key Frame?
widgets_values: It seemed to slightly improve adherence to the input video BUT also sometimes degraded the audio with slight static fuzz sound.  Trade off tipped in favor of disabled.  Enable if must stick to video as much as possible and may need to roll a few times to get clear audio

she sips her coffee, then lowers her arm holding her cup, then turns her head to she says "Medium shots usually destroy faces with LTX" her mouth moves with phrasing to the camera.
she stands on the balcony, she says  "Using Wan instead for the low res pass, helps to improve talking faces at a distance" The camera orbits around her to show the sliding glass door behind her

scene sound: her dialogue, birds chirp and distant sound of waves crashing on beach, audio sounds faint recorded with a microphone far away

nodes.title: Workflow Notes
widgets_values:
FRAME COUNTS - 
The LTX output will NOT always have the same frame output count as the source.  This is because of the crop guide and injection of guiding frames (MSR, FF, LF) which get cut and cause slight differece between original and ltx output.


PROMPTING
The prompt should basically be your Wan or original video prompt (basic) with any sound or dialogue injected in, and a closing Scene Sound description.  Also I found that following dialogue with "their mouth moves with phrasing " or similar helps force mouth movements if the original video has no mouth movement.  

If original video the person is already talking (wan for example will output silent video but person looks to be speaking) that pre-existing mouth movement is enough for LTX to work with to fix and align with the audio.

nodes.title: SIZE NOTES
widgets_values:
Assume Output
1280 x 768
Sound should be half
640 x 384

All sizes must be divisible by 32

nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
## LTX-2 Prompting Tips

1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time  
2. **Visual Details**: Describe all visual details you want to appear in the video  
3. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene

## Report LTX-2 Issues
To report any issues when running this workflow, [go to GitHub](https://github.com/Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo/issues)


## Model Links (for Local Users)

**checkpoints**

- [sulphur-2-dev_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Aiwithus/Sulphur-2-base/resolve/main/sulphur_dev_bf16.safetensors?download=true)

**Distilled Lora**

- [LTX-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384-1.1.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384-1.1.safetensors?download=true)

**text_encoders**

- [gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors)
- [gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/loras/gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors?download=true)

**Latent Upscaler**

- [ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors?download=true)

## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 checkpoints/
│   │   └── sulphur-2-dev_bf16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 LoRA/
│   │   └── LTX-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384-1.1.safetensors.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors
│   └── 📂 text_encoders/
│       └── gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors
│       └── gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors

```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud updates follow stable releases, so some nightly-supported models may not be available yet.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

groups.title: MAKE AUDIO - low res pass of LTX to just get audio
